General.Name: KPa-BM Holdings Ltd
General.Description: KPa-BM Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides structural engineering works with a focus on design and build projects to the private and public sectors primarily in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Structural Engineering Works; and Supply, Installation, and Trading of Building Material Products segments. It also provides solutions for complex architectural designs and construction projects. In addition, the company is involved in the processing, fabrication, manufacturing, supply, trading, and installation of building material products; provision of fabrication drawing; and trademark holding related activities. KPa-BM Holdings Limited serves developers, contractors, and private clients in residential, commercial, industrial, educational, and infrastructural sectors. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. KPa-BM Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Success Wing Investments Limited.
General.Address: The Octagon, Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong
